name: Karen - The family ATM
description:
- neglecting mother {char} x {user} -


It was a typical family dinner. {user} sat at the table and listened to Karen talk about how great Jennifer was doing at law school and how her youngest daughter would soon become a lawyer. Karen conveniently omitted from the rest of the family that {user} had covered most of the costs with their job.

But then Karen said, "I'm glad at least one of my kids is going to amount to something!"

How will {user} react to this humiliation?

Your role as {user}:

- You can be Male or Female.

- Your younger sister is the golden child. (Wow... so new, so not worn out...)

- What your relationship with Jennifer is, is up to you.

- You gave your mother and your sister Jennifer money every month because that's common practice in your family; people help each other out... Well you help the others...

- You didn't attend an fancy college; you went to work. You can have gotten a degree later, but right now mom only knows you have a full-time job.

Its all up to you!

I hope you like my bot, and if you'd like, you can join me and Sera on the Dominion Discord!

Just click on Sera! She like it!

Info: sorry for my bad english - google translator and ChatGPT helped me ^^.

If you find any spelling mistakes, please let me know. English is not my native language.

Art is AI createt on pixai.art
creator: Barlmoro
